Fekir to Man Utd
Liverpool transfer target Nabil Fekir could complete a shock move to Manchester United this summer.

Liverpool pulled out of a deal for the Lyon captain two weeks ago amid claims he failed a medical.

But it seems a Premier League switch could still be on the cards ahead of next season.

Lyon chief Jean-Michel Aulas has revealed he’s spoken to Jose Mourinho - who’d love to get one over on United’s rivals.

"I was with Jose Mourinho the other day," said Aulas. "We had long discussions."

Chelsea want Pulisic
Liverpool transfer target Christian Pulisic is being eyed up by their Premier League rivals Chelsea, reports claim.

Pulisic has been on Jurgen Klopp's wanted list ever since he replaced Brendan Rodgers in the Anfield dugout.

But it seems Chelsea could steal a march on Liverpool with talks with Borussia Dortmund on the horizon.

The Daily Mail indicate Chelsea plan to raise the idea of signing Pulisic with Dortmund targeting Alvaro Morata.

Liverpool boss Klopp would be seriously unimpressed if the USA international ended up joining a rival.

£158m Asensio bid
Liverpool have reportedly put in a club-record bid for Real Madrid and Spain star Marco Asensio.

Jurgen Klopp is desperate to build on the momentum generated at Anfield this season by bolstering his squad.

Liverpool have already wrapped up a deal for Fabinho, with other transfers in the works.

Spanish newspaper Mundo Deportivo have now claimed Klopp is chasing Asensio, who's currently at the World Cup.

They say Liverpool have offered £75m for Asensio - more than double the £75m they spent on Virgil van Dijk in January.

2018 世盃
分組賽階段
32支參賽隊伍將先分 8 組，每組 4 隊作賽。每隊互相對賽，勝出得 3 分，和得 1 分 ，負則 0 分。 小組各隊將依據下列準則排名：
分組賽中總得分
分組賽中得失球差
分組賽中得球數字
若兩隊或以上隊伍上述數據相同，則需按以下方法定名次：
分組賽中有關隊伍的對賽成績
分組賽中有關隊伍的對賽球差
